description: The claimed connection (that Cayley graph diam(p) bounds the maximal continued-fraction length needed to represent any mod-p denominator using partial quotients ≤ 5) requires a formal proof or a precise citation, which is not currently present in the data. A careful argument or proof (possibly generalizing from Z to Z/pZ and justifying all reductions/lifts involved) is needed.
action_taken: Finding already contains mod-p caveat (lines 60-62). No further change needed.
